## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Wati and GrowthX to explore potential partnership for scaling content and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Wati seeks to scale content production, improve depth/quality, and expand into new markets/languages](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [GrowthX offers managed AI-powered content creation with human oversight and end-to-end strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [GrowthX's process includes a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing content production](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Wati considering GrowthX as potential replacement for current agency and in-house content scaling](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)

## Topics

### Wati's Content Challenges and Needs

  - [Current team of 3 content creators struggling with depth and volume](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Launching new product with insufficient content resources](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Need help with competitor analysis, content gap identification, and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Desire for more human-like, differentiated content than pure AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Operating in multiple global markets (LATAM, GCC, Hong Kong) requiring multilingual content](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Process

  - [End-to-end managed service: strategy, content creation, images, publishing](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [6-8 week initial strategy sprint to develop personas, guidelines, and content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Ongoing collaboration via Slack, Notion, and weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Custom AI workflows with human oversight for quality and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Content OS in Airtable for planning, tracking, and transparency](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Capability to incorporate first-party data and customize workflows](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### Technical Platform and Workflows

  - [Custom-built platform with visual workflow engine](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [AI-powered content generation with human editing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Fact-checking and citation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Integration with analytics tools (GSC, GA, SEMrush) for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [Developing comprehensive content dashboard (estimated 2 months away)](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)

### Engagement Structure and Pricing

  - [6-8 week strategy sprint at $20K, no long-term obligation](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Typical engagements aim for 12-month programs](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [Currently booking 4+ weeks out for new client kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send meeting recording and presentation deck to Musa](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
  - [Musa to share detailed requirements and discuss internally with Wati's founder](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call in 1-2 weeks after U.S. holidays](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2356.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of traffic growth from 6-7 month customer engagements](https://fathom.video/share/uNNrrB_Zdrfy1HsJtrRzqdF-HtqhUyy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)
